# 一图秒懂日本啤酒🍺去居酒屋一定用得上✅

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?ranksessionid=1782032740\_7&chksm=...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?ranksessionid=1782032740_7&chksm=9f1411fea86398e86c82b0de7d9064f8594b2dd2d92a842ffb938aaec29e202057fde1b622f9&exptype=masonry_feed_brief_content_elite_for_feeds_u2i&req_id=1782035980047322&scene=169&mid=2247488221&subscene=200&sn=a2f6fd1b6f4ccd180f19e0d382f6efca&idx=1&__biz=MzA3MzAyOTE5Ng==&sessionid=1782032739&clicktime=1782040221&enterid=1782040221&flutter_pos=0&biz_enter_id=5&jumppath=WAWebViewController_1782036397568,WAWebViewController_1782036398096,20020_1782036427414,1104_1782040219299&jumppathdepth=4&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004b28&nettype=WIFI&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=QlA8liehx8MR0DMEVUPG1elNXaK0ii606sPKXgfUsWZJ+p2STH0LYATunNmxo3an&wx_header=3)

![](attachments/1d97b8b4c83db89e.png)![](attachments/b46b0ba73a92f1aa.png)![](attachments/ef3abe8c39401467.png)![](attachments/323b6480ebcaeddb.png)

一图秒懂「日本啤酒」🍺

✔️麒麟、朝日、三宝乐/札幌、三得利、冲绳、

✔️常陆野猫头鹰、伊势角屋、轻井泽……

💡1分钟搞懂日本热门主流啤酒🔥

✨️酒蒙子快快🐎住！

去居酒屋一定用得上哦👻~

#懂酒帝#啤酒#日本啤酒#朝日啤酒#麒麟啤酒#三宝乐#精酿啤酒
